decision_commentary: Invoice covers M3 — Executive Plans Approved: $9,000 USD. All required fields present: project_name, client_name, milestone_name, amount ($9,000 — matches Bruno's payment schedule M3 amount exactly), due_date (2026-07-21), payment_instructions (bank transfer with reference code), currency (USD), and running_total ($30,000 — full architecture fee reached, correct). Invoice history documents all 3 milestones: M1 $12,000 (paid 2026-03-31), M2 $9,000 (paid 2026-04-21), M3 $9,000 (due 2026-07-21). Total $30,000 matches architecture fee. Clarity scored 4: payment_instructions contain placeholder bank/CLABE values — client cannot pay without completing the bank configuration, but per auto-fail conditions this does not trigger failure. State_sync scored 3 per simulated run note.
